subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! We testify that thou hast attained unto the presence of the Wronged One on two occasions. He it is Who hath aided thee and enabled thee to recognize Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین نشهد انک فزت بلقاء المظلوم مرتین انه هو الذی ایدک و عرفک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
